comment_scope_signal: Two complementary signals — tag union AS PRIMARY + id-override as SAFETY NET. Operator: don't miss any workflows just because they aren't tagged. New workflows landing in this entity's folder should be tagged with one of the tags below; if a workflow surfaces in the folder without a matching tag, add its id to additional_workflow_ids (and tag it next time the operator is in the n8n UI).
comment_additional_workflow_ids: Workflow ids that belong to this entity's scope but lack any of the tags above. The emitter unions tag-results + this array, dedupes by id. Empty list is normal — fill if the operator spots an untagged in-scope workflow.
comment_archived: Archived workflows that fall in the tag union are EMITTED with attributes.archived=true. Archived workflows OUTSIDE the tag union are out-of-scope by definition (they cannot be matched by the entity's surface signal).
comment_propagation: THIS IS A TEMPLATE PLACEHOLDER. On first use at your project, set `entity` to the entity name, set `mcp_server` to that entity's n8n MCP server (e.g. mcp__n8n-mcp-<your-instance>), and fill `tags` with the entity's per-folder tag convention (the operator confirms the tag set at first propagation). Keep additional_workflow_ids empty unless an in-scope workflow lacks a tag. Each entity has its own folder/tag convention.
